headline: Why Is Entergy (ETR) Down 7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Entergy (ETR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Entergy’s gas projects are one-third of MISO’s fast-track interconnection process
summary: Roughly 70% of Entergy’s proposed capacity additions would serve planned data centers in Louisiana and Mississippi.
